text.content: Additional recovery options added 2026-05-03: (4) External drive backup-restore — encrypted full-state backup to external drive (workspace, agent state, config, secrets export), restore script that rebuilds from drive on any machine. (5) openclaw reset recovery — explore openclaw reset as L2 recovery path: what state survives a reset, what must be re-seeded from backup, can workspace git repo + keychain export fully reconstruct a working platform post-reset? Define the minimum viable backup set for a clean reset-and-restore.
